checks.name: windows-path-merge
checks.detail: Windows PATH and PATHEXT handling now merges duplicate-cased env keys instead of losing usable values when `Path`/`PATH` or `PATHEXT`/`pathext` coexist.

checks.name: runtime-windows-shim-regressions
checks.detail: Runtime readiness tests pass for `Path`, lowercase `path`/`pathext`, and duplicated `Path`/`PATH` scenarios.

checks.name: bootstrap-doctor-regression
checks.detail: Bootstrap doctor test proves a Windows-style `codex.cmd` shim no longer produces `CODEX_MISSING` when found through mixed-case Windows env keys.
